verses.text: Topa in hong hopih a, “Beelsekpa kiangah pai in la, leibeel khat va lei in. Mite' lakah upa pawlkhat leh siampi upa pawlkhat tonpih in la
nisuahna lam kongpi gei, Hinnom kuam-ah pai-in, kong gen thute tua lai-ah va taangko in

Nangmah in, ‘Judah kumpite leh Jerusalem khuamite aw, Topa' kammal ngai un. Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hong cihin-ah: En un, hih munah kong tun'sak ding siatna lianlua ahih manin a za mi khempeuhte' bil sungah ging den ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite in kei hong taisan khinzo uh a, amaute-a kipanin a pu a pate uh leh Judah kumpite' theih ngeiloh pasian dangte' kiangah paknamtui halin, hih mun a ninsak uh hi. Hih mun pen mawhna neilo mite thahna sisan tawh dimsak uh a
ka thupiak a hilo, ka ngaihsutkhak beek zong a hilo, a tate uh meihal biakna tawh Baal biakna dingin Baal biakna tau sangte a lam khinzo uh hi
Tua ahih manin, en un, Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih mun pen Tofeth ahi zongin Hinnom Kuam ahi zongin a kicih nawnloh hun hong tung ding hi. Kithahna Kuam a kicizaw ding hi

Hih munah Judah mite leh Jerusalem mite' ngimna ka tangtungsak kei ding a, a galte uh' namsau leh a thatnuamte' khutlumin amaute ka sisak ding hi. Amau' luanghawmte huihlaka leeng vasate leh leilak ganhingte' an dingin ka pia ding hi
Hih khuapi a mulkimhuai leh a simmawhhuai ka suaksak ding a, a kantan mi khempeuh in khuapi siatna hangin lamdangsa-in zahpihin a phitsan ding uh hi
A galte uh leh a that nuam mite in, amaute sim ding uh a, nek ding omlo lua ahih manin a tapate leh a tanute uh' sa ka nesak ding a, mi khempeuh in a vengte' sa a ne ding uh hi,’ va ci in
“Tua ciangin na tonpihte' muhin na beel sukham in la

amaute kiangah, Vanglian Topa in a cihin-ah, hih beelsekpa' beel kisukham a, a kibawlphat kik theih nawnloh bangmahin hih mite leh hih khuapi ka sukham ding hi. Mun dangah si vuina ding mun om nawnlo ding ahih manin Tofeth nangawnah a kivui ding uh hi
Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih mun leh hih muna teng mite tungah tu-a bangin ka hih ding a, hih khuapi Tofeth ka bangsak ding hi

Jerusalem khua-a innte leh Judah kumpite' innte-a kipan, innkhum zangah vantunga aksite khempeuh tungah paknamtui hal biakna a kipiakna innte leh pasian dangte tungah dawn ding biakna a kibuakna innte khempeuh a vekin Tofeth mun bangin a nin a suak ding hi, ci hi, va ci in,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in thu gen dinga hong sawlna Tofeth panin ka ciahkik a, Topa' biakinn sungah dingin mi khempeuh kiangah thu ka gen a

“Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in a cihin-ah: En un, hih khuapi leh a kiima khuaneute tungah ka gensa siatna khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lungsim uh khauhsak uh a, ka thute a ngai nuam kei uh hi, ci hi,” ka ci hi.
